dsl_rule.translation_notes: Cup with Handle pattern detection requires price pattern recognition beyond indicator-only constraints. Approximated using: (1) price above 200-day MA (handle forms above 200 SMA), (2) volume breakout using vol_ratio_20 (50%+ above normal), (3) upward breakout using dc_upper (Donchian channel breakout simulates cup resistance breakout). Handle duration (1-2 weeks), cup edges alignment, and handle depth (10-15% drop) are structural pattern properties that cannot be fully expressed with indicator operators alone. Exit uses 50-day MA crossbelow as reversal signal. Stop loss set at 10% matching stated handle drop range. Hold period set to 60 days based on average pattern timeframe.

source_rule_text: Cup with Handle: A reversal pattern with a U-shaped cup followed by a downward price correction (handle) in the upper portion, breaking out upward on high volume
